pageContext.name: Gandalf the Grey (Ultimate Edition)
pageContext.description: The second half scale with full-body statue of The Lord of the Rings, the wizard Gandalf is coming. The Fellowship is beginning to take shape. The Gandalf the Grey (Ultimate Edition) Statue belongs to the 1/2 Scale Master Forge Series, where Infinity Studios and Penguin Toys adopted the iconic character to a half-scale but with a full body of exquisite details delicately and lovingly restored, giving this item the ultimate presence. It is designed to meet the desire of collectors to pursue the ultimate class in their The Lord of the Rings collection.  1/2 Master Forge Series statues are equipped with NFC chips that collectors can touch with their NFC-enabled phones to unlock more information and create even more possibilities.  This statue approximately stands at an impressive 61.42' tall from base to the tip of the blade Glamdring and features a silicone-molded head piece. The silicone sculpt utilises platinum-grade silicone, which won't decolor and deform over time so the statue can be preserved for a longer time. Extremely detailed hair-rooting techniques have been implemented to not only the hair but also the eyebrows as well as the beard.  The portrait details the folds and wrinkles on the face, making Gandalf's age more vivid. The dramatic expression conveys the determination and courage of Gandalf when he fought against the demon Balrog.
